title: CRISPR Q3 2024: CASGEVY Expands Global Reach, $1.9B Cash Position as Losses Narrow
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Q3 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Results: Net loss of $85.9 million, improved from $112.2 million in Q3 2023. R&D expenses of $82.2 million, down from $90.7 million year-over-year. Cash position of $1.935 billion in cash, equivalents, and marketable securities. Grant revenue of $602,000. Major Business Highlights: CASGEVY regulatory expansion reached Switzerland and Canada for treating sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia in patients 12 and older. The company has activated 45 authorized treatment centers (ATCs) globally with approximately 40 patients having cells collected across all regions. The pipeline continues advancing with next-generation CAR T candidates CTX112 and CTX131, plus in vivo programs CTX310 and CTX320 targeting cardiovascular indications. CTX211, an allogeneic stem cell therapy for Type 1 Diabetes, remains in Phase 1 trials. Market Reaction: CRSP stock declined 0.45% on the announcement day.
